title: Uncanny Art Properties
entries: It seems to watch you wherever you stand in the room.
It changes, very slightly, every time you look away.
It hums quietly in the dark, too low to place.
It sparkles in light that isn't there.
Cats are drawn to it; other animals will not come near.
The figures in it look vaguely, uncomfortably familiar.
You hear a faint ringing when you stand close.
It is always a few degrees colder than the wall around it.
Dust never settles on it, no matter how long it hangs.
It appears in the background of other, older paintings.
People who sleep near it share the same dream.
There are small offerings left beneath it, and no one admits to leaving them.
Its subject's eyes are open in candlelight and closed in daylight.
It casts a shadow that doesn't quite match its shape.
Whispering to it, some swear, gets a whisper back.
It is part of a set; somewhere, the other pieces are looking for it.
Reflections in it lag a half-second behind.
It smells faintly of a place you've never been but somehow miss.
Flowers left before it stay fresh for weeks.
It was reported stolen, from three different cities, in three different centuries.
